game_name: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain
description: Default PC keyboard and mouse bindings for MGSV:TPP.
game_context: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain â€” stealth action. You are Snake infiltrating enemy outposts. Core loop: move through the environment, scan for guards, shoot enemies only when clearly visible, sprint between cover. Do not stand still.

named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_FORWARD: Sprint straight forward — path ahead is clear, no threats
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_RIGHT: Sprint forward while panning camera right — explore and curve right
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_LEFT: Sprint forward while panning camera left — explore and curve left
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_UP_RIGHT: Sprint forward while panning camera up-right — check high ground
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_LOOK_UP_LEFT: Sprint forward while panning camera up-left — check high ground
named_action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT: Right-click aim then left-click shoot once — enemy clearly visible
named_action_descriptions.AIM_BURST: Aim and fire 3 shots — stationary or close enemy
named_action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT_STRAFE_RIGHT: Aim+shoot while side-stepping right — fire while dodging right
named_action_descriptions.AIM_SHOOT_STRAFE_LEFT: Aim+shoot while side-stepping left — fire while dodging left
named_action_descriptions.DIVE_DODGE: Spacebar quick dive — emergency dodge when bullets are incoming
named_action_descriptions.EVADE_SPRINT_RIGHT: Sprint + pan right to break contact — escape enemy to the right
named_action_descriptions.EVADE_SPRINT_LEFT: Sprint + pan left to break contact — escape enemy to the left
named_action_descriptions.SPRINT_BACK: Sprint backward — create distance from an enemy
named_action_descriptions.PEEK_RIGHT: Pan camera right — scan for threats while stationary or in cover
named_action_descriptions.PEEK_LEFT: Pan camera left — scan for threats while stationary or in cover
named_action_descriptions.PEEK_UP: Tilt camera up — check enemies on high ground or windows
named_action_descriptions.CROUCH_PEEK_RIGHT: Crouch then pan right — low-profile peek from behind cover
named_action_descriptions.CROUCH_PEEK_LEFT: Crouch then pan left — low-profile peek from behind cover
named_action_descriptions.INTERACT_OBJECT: Press E to interact — ONLY when interact prompt is visible on screen
named_action_descriptions.DO_NOTHING: No input at all — ONLY during cutscenes, loading screens, or menus

action_descriptions.EXPLORE: No enemies visible â€” sprint and scan the environment
action_descriptions.COMBAT: Enemy clearly visible â€” aim and shoot, optionally while strafing
action_descriptions.EVADE: Taking fire or danger â€” dive, roll, or sprint sideways
action_descriptions.COVER: Near cover â€” crouch and scan without exposing self
action_descriptions.INTERACT: On-screen prompt â€” interact with object / NPC
action_descriptions.IDLE: Cutscene / loading screen / menu â€” no input
